channel.title: Really bad image resolution
channel.description:
Hi there,
The images on my source WP site have great resolution. But, on the chakra theme, they are really fuzzy. Is there a plugin either for fronitity or WP you'd recommend? Or is there a way to optimize images in the theme?
The issue is mainly on the portfolio page. Wp source site: https://personalsitesource.xyz/ Repo: https://github.com/Trevorton27/chakraPersonalSiteBuild
Any and all suggestions appreciated on this one. :-)

item.title: Really bad image resolution
item.dc:creator: spiral272
item.description:
Hi there,

The images on my source WP site have great resolution. But, on the chakra theme, they are really fuzzy. Is there a plugin either for fronitity or WP you’d recommend? Or is there a way to optimize images in the theme?

The issue is mainly on the portfolio page.
Wp source site: https://personalsitesource.xyz/
Repo: GitHub - Trevorton27/chakraPersonalSiteBuild

Any and all suggestions appreciated on this one.

Read full topic
